response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the finale of the song 'DAN DAN 心魅かれてく'. The provided JSON reference contains lyrics for the beginning of the song, so I have discarded it and relied strictly on the audio and visual cues. Spoken outro and relevant on-screen text are transcribed and translated to ensure full context.

subtitles.original: 結局 君のことだけ見ていた
subtitles.english: In the end, I was only looking at you.
To the far side of the sea,

subtitles.original: みんなー！ ろぼさー！
今日は見てくれてありがとう！
この後はなんと メンバー限定でも歌います！
subtitles.english: After this, I'll even be singing in a members-only stream!

subtitles.original: グッズもめっちゃかわちいから ゲットしてくれよなー！
subtitles.english: The merch is also super cute, so please get some!

subtitles.original: なんか君も遅いね、ドラゴンくん
subtitles.english: You're kind of slow too, Dragon-kun.

subtitles.original: はろ〜ぼ飯店 ようこそ
NEXT アンコールライブ
